extortion.description: Gregory N. Mirsky is an AWS certified solutions architect and security specialist with extensive experience in optimizing cloud infrastructure and applications. He specializes in cloud migration, cybersecurity compliance, and implementing modern application architectures, such as serverless and containerized solutions. His targeted clients include companies seeking to enhance their IT security and operational efficiency, as well as those in need of infrastructure modernization. With a strong background in collaboration between technology teams, Mirsky offers holistic and strategic approaches to systems design.
